title: Ghaziabad Espionage Case: Woman Arrested as Key Player in Pakistani Spy Network
description: Ghaziabad police have arrested Meera, identified as a central figure in a Pakistani espionage module that used stolen SIM cards and CCTV cameras to spy on sensitive Indian sites. Investigators say she ran an e‑rickshaw service in Mathura as a cover while supplying illegal weapons and maintaining direct contact with ISI handler Sarfaraz Sardar.
